items.title: Photographer Spends Six Years with Chilean Ranchers Who Live in Isolation
items.summary: A photographer spent six years documenting Chilean ranchers, known as "puesteros," who live and work alone on vast private lands for months at a time for a new photography book. [Read More]

items.title: This Photographer Got So Tired of Compression He Built a Photo-Sharing Website Without It
items.summary: As camera megapixel counts keep rising, the limitations of online photo sharing only become more apparent. Most photographers share photos online via platforms that use heavy-duty compression, making…

items.title: Viltrox EVO 75mm f/1.8 and 90mm f/2.2 Review: Basically Twins
items.summary: This time around, my review process went a little differently. Instead of doing a full deep-dive into one lens, I decided to compare two brand new ones against each other. [Read More]

items.title: Photographer Michael Shainblum Reveals New Zealand’s Remarkable Beauty
